question: You picked Mallorca. What was pulling you?
dek: Same island, different seasons of the heart.

options.label: Almond blossom hills
options.hint: late-winter pink, Tramuntana at your back, no tour buses yet

options.label: Tramuntana passes
options.hint: Sa Calobra · long climb · longer lunch after

options.label: Late dinner, light on the table
options.hint: 10pm, boats in the port, nobody rushing you out

options.label: Stone village + sea view
options.hint: Deià or Valldemossa — cliffside café mornings, stone cool to the touch

options.label: Palma on a Saturday night
options.hint: old town alleys · cava · plaça tables spilling out

options.label: Quiet cove · towel · book
options.hint: no wifi · no dinner plan · just the water

outcomeAction: Leading thread gets a paired Sky Clock vignette for the Mallorca zone.
author: mike
source: chat 2026-04-20 — 'once selected more polls about that pathway and then other polls that are similar so multiple start points and potential paths'
